source: A Survey of Model Compression and Acceleration for Deep Neural Networks.pdf

concepts.finding: Model compression techniques categorized into four schemes: parameter pruning and sharing, low-rank factorization, transferred/compact filters, and knowledge distillation.
concepts.implication: Systematic taxonomy helps select appropriate compression methods for deploying search models under different latency and memory constraints.
concepts.open_question: Which compression technique yields the best accuracy-efficiency tradeoff for transformer-based ranking models?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: For transformer ranking models, 8-bit quantization + knowledge distillation will provide the best accuracy-efficiency tradeoff compared to any single technique.
